How CKW thinks about mobile

Designing for the phone is a different craft — not a smaller version of the desktop.

Most agencies build the desktop site first and let it shrink. CKW does the opposite. Every layout, photo crop, button, and reading order is designed for the phone first — and only then sized up for the browser. Here is what that actually changes.

1

Tap targets sized for thumbs

Buttons are at least 44px tall, spaced apart, and easy to hit one-handed — not desktop links shrunk down to fingertip-misses.

2

Photo crops chosen for the phone

Hero images are cropped vertically with the focal point in the middle of the frame, so the most important detail still shows when the screen is narrow.

3

Reading order built around the call

The phone number, hours, and contact button are reachable in the first scroll — because someone deciding whether to call you should never have to hunt for the way to do it.

1Tap targets 2Photo crop 3Reading order
Don't take our word for it.

Scan this with your phone right now and pull up Blue Costa on your own screen — see exactly what we mean.

What it costs

Two clear prices. No surprises.

Most studios make you choose: tell them what you want, or tell them what you can afford. CKW does both. Two clear prices, both for real custom work — no templates, no compromise on design. Pick the size that fits the business and book it, or send a message and we'll find the right match together.

How CKW compares. Most freelance designers charge $1,500–$4,000 for a 5-page site and small agencies start at $6,000+. CKW runs lean by design — small studio, no overhead, the same person on every project from sketch to launch — so studio-quality custom work comes in for a fraction of the cost.

Common questions

A few things worth clearing up before we start.

The honest answers to the questions most small business owners ask before hiring a studio. Anything missing — send a note through the contact form below and CKW will answer it the same way: directly.

What if I already have a domain?

That's the easiest case. CKW points the new site to your existing domain — no migration, no downtime, no losing your email. If your current domain is held by a registrar you no longer like (GoDaddy, Network Solutions, etc.) CKW can also transfer it to a cleaner setup for you. No charge for the move.

Can I edit the site myself after launch?

Yes. Every CKW build ships with simple inline edits documented in a short walkthrough — change copy, swap photos, update phone numbers. For bigger changes (adding a new page, restructuring), CKW handles those directly. Email back, get a quick turnaround, no monthly retainer.

What happens if I don't love the first draft?

CKW builds the first draft based on a short discovery call where you describe the business in your own words. If something feels off, you say so — that's literally what the revision rounds are for (one round on Starter, two on Plus). Most builds land within the included revisions. If you want a third pass, it's $150 — flat, never billed by the hour.

What's actually included in the price?

The full build: custom design, the domain registered and configured, fast Cloudflare hosting, a working contact form (Formspree), mobile and desktop versions, and basic SEO setup so the site is findable on Google. No template fees, no plugin licenses, no "we'll need to upgrade your plan" surprises. The price you see is the price you pay.

How fast can it actually launch?

Most Starter builds go live within a week of the discovery call. Plus builds take 10–14 days because there's more design and copy to nail down. The bottleneck is usually content from you — photos, descriptions, hours, services — not the build itself. Send those quickly and CKW moves quickly.

Who this is for

The right fit for a small studio doing serious work.

CKW is built for a specific kind of business. Being honest about who it's not for is part of what keeps the work focused and the price fair.

✓ A great fit

  • Local contractors, trades, and home-service businesses
  • Family-owned shops and owner-operated companies
  • Service businesses with no current website (or a weak one)
  • Small operations that need credibility and a contact form
  • Owners who want one clear price, not a quote sheet

× Probably not the right fit

  • E-commerce stores with large product catalogs
  • Companies needing custom apps, dashboards, or logins
  • Multi-location businesses needing 20+ unique pages
  • Brands that need a full identity rebuild from scratch
  • Anyone looking for ongoing weekly marketing services
How it works

From "we should really do this" to live, fast.

CKW handles the moving parts that usually slow a project down — the domain, the hosting, the form setup — so the only thing the business owner has to do is tell their story.

01

Quick call

A 20-minute conversation about the business, the customers, and what the site needs to do. No proposal documents.

02

Build

CKW designs, writes, and builds the site over a few focused days — custom design, contact form, and domain setup all included.

03

You review

You see the live site, request any tweaks, and CKW handles the revisions to lock it in.

04

It goes live

The site is published on your custom domain, hosted on Cloudflare, and ready for your customers to find — on every screen.

Why CKW exists

It started with one family who deserved better.

I built CKW Design Company after working with Blue Costa Landscape — a family-owned contractor local to me who was so focused on their work and their passion that they had no time, and no budget, to hire a design firm. So they had no online presence at all.

I charged them $600, bought the domain, and got them set up with a working website and a working contact form. No discovery phase, no twelve-week timeline, no $15,000 invoice. Just a real website for people who needed one.

That project is what CKW is. It's a studio for people who work hard, who do real things, and who don't have the time or the money to maintain an online presence — so I build it for them. Realistic pricing, real turnaround times, and a heart to help. Everything handled directly by me. No overhead. No middlemen. Just the work.

— Charles · CKW Design Company
Founder & sole builder
